---
marp: true
theme: default
size: 16:9
paginate: true
html: true
footer: "新会碧桂园凤凰酒店 AI 智能前台（Chatflow 版）· 海南职业技术学院 · 彬彬有礼"
---

<style>
/* ─────────────────────────────────────────
   BASE：深色底 + 渐变点缀
───────────────────────────────────────── */
section {
  background: radial-gradient(circle at 95% -15%, rgba(102,126,234,0.10) 0%, transparent 45%), #0b1527;
  color: #c8d5e8;
  font-family: 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif;
  padding: 108px 72px 44px 72px;
  font-size: 19px;
  line-height: 1.65;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  /* 覆盖 Marp 默认主题的白色 CSS 变量 */
  --bgColor-default: transparent;
  --bgColor-muted: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
  --borderColor-muted: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  --fgColor-default: #e2e8f0;
  --fgColor-muted: #a0b0c8;
  --color-prettylights-syntax-entity: #a78bfa;
}
section::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 18px; right: 22px;
  width: 160px; height: 42px;
  background: url("data:image/png;base64,") no-repeat right center / contain;
  opacity: 0.28;
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 10;
}
section.title::before {
  display: none;
}
section::after {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
  font-size: 0.65em;
}
footer {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.28) !important;
  font-size: 0.62em !important;
}
h1 {
  color: #ffffff;
  font-size: 2.0em;
  font-weight: 700;
  position: absolute;
  top: 36px;
  left: 72px;
  right: 72px;
  margin: 0;
  padding-bottom: 10px;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #667eea;
  letter-spacing: 0.01em;
}
h2 { color: #a78bfa; font-size: 1.35em; font-weight: 600; margin: 0 0 10px 0; }
h3 { color: #7dd3fc; font-size: 1.1em; margin: 0 0 8px 0; }
strong { color: #ffffff; }
em { color: #a78bfa; font-style: normal; }
table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 14px 0; font-size: 0.88em; background: transparent !important; }
thead tr, thead th, tbody tr, tbody td, tr, th, td {
  background-color: transparent !important;
}
th {
  background: rgba(102,126,234,0.30) !important;
  color: #ffffff !important;
  padding: 9px 15px;
  text-align: left;
  font-weight: 600;
  border: 1px solid rgba(102,126,234,0.30) !important;
}
td {
  padding: 8px 15px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.09) !important;
  color: #dde6f2 !important;
}
tr:nth-child(even) td { background: rgba(102,126,234,0.06) !important; }
tr:hover td { background: rgba(102,126,234,0.12) !important; }
blockquote {
  background: rgba(102,126,234,0.10);
  border-left: 4px solid #667eea;
  padding: 12px 20px;
  margin: 12px 0;
  border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
  color: #e2e8f0;
  font-size: 0.93em;
}
ul, ol { padding-left: 26px; margin: 8px 0; }
li { margin: 6px 0; }
code {
  background: rgba(102,126,234,0.18);
  color: #a78bfa;
  padding: 1px 6px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-size: 0.88em;
}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────
   TITLE SLIDE
───────────────────────────────────────── */
section.title {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #06101e 0%, #1a237e 55%, #4a148c 100%);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 60px 80px;
}
section.title::before { display: none; }
section.ending {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #06101e 0%, #1a237e 55%, #4a148c 100%);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 60px 80px;
}
section.ending::before { opacity: 0.22; }
section.title h1, section.ending h1 {
  position: static;
  color: #ffffff;
  font-size: 2.5em;
  border: none;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  text-shadow: 0 0 60px rgba(102,126,234,0.55);
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
section.title h2 {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.70);
  font-size: 1.15em;
  font-weight: 400;
  margin-bottom: 36px;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
}
section.title p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); font-size: 0.88em; margin: 3px 0; }

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────
   CHAPTER SLIDES（过渡页）
───────────────────────────────────────── */
section.chapter {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #5b6de8 0%, #7c3aed 60%, #a21caf 100%);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: flex-start;
  padding: 60px 90px;
}
section.chapter::before { opacity: 0.30; }
section.chapter h1 {
  position: static;
  color: #ffffff;
  font-size: 3.0em;
  border: none;
  text-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
section.chapter h2 {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.72);
  font-size: 1.15em;
  font-weight: 400;
}
section.chapter .num {
  font-size: 7em;
  font-weight: 900;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  line-height: 1;
  position: absolute;
  right: 80px;
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  pointer-events: none;
  letter-spacing: -0.05em;
}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────
   OPC SLIDE
───────────────────────────────────────── */
section.opc {
  background: linear-gradient(150deg, #0b1527 0%, #1a1040 50%, #2d0f50 100%);
}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────
   UTILITY
───────────────────────────────────────── */
.hl-box {
  background: rgba(102,126,234,0.12);
  border: 1px solid rgba(102,126,234,0.35);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 16px 22px;
  margin: 10px 0;
}
.success { color: #4ade80; font-weight: 700; }
.danger  { color: #f87171; font-weight: 700; }
.accent  { color: #38bdf8; font-weight: 700; }
.purple  { color: #c084fc; font-weight: 700; }
.big {
  display: block;
  font-size: 3.8em;
  font-weight: 900;
  color: #38bdf8;
  text-align: center;
  line-height: 1.05;
}
.big-label {
  display: block;
  text-align: center;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
  font-size: 0.75em;
  margin-top: 2px;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.grid2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 18px;
  margin: 14px 0;
}
.grid3 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 16px;
  margin: 14px 0;
}
.card {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.09);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 16px 18px;
}
.card-blue {
  border-color: rgba(102,126,234,0.45);
  background: rgba(102,126,234,0.07);
}
.card-purple {
  border-color: rgba(167,139,250,0.45);
  background: rgba(167,139,250,0.07);
}
.card h3 { margin-top: 0; }
.tag {
  display: inline-block;
  background: rgba(102,126,234,0.25);
  color: #a78bfa;
  padding: 2px 10px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  font-size: 0.78em;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin: 2px 3px;
}
.tag-green {
  background: rgba(74,222,128,0.15);
  color: #4ade80;
}
.tag-red {
  background: rgba(248,113,113,0.15);
  color: #f87171;
}
.flow-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
  margin: 16px 0;
}
.fn {
  background: rgba(102,126,234,0.18);
  border: 1px solid rgba(102,126,234,0.40);
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 9px 16px;
  font-size: 0.84em;
  color: #e2e8f0;
  text-align: center;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.fa { color: #667eea; font-size: 1.3em; }
.divider {
  width: 100%;
  height: 1px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(102,126,234,0.4), transparent);
  margin: 16px 0;
}
</style>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 1 — 封面
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->

<div style="margin-bottom:20px">
  <div style="display:inline-block;background:rgba(102,126,234,0.25);border:1px solid rgba(102,126,234,0.55);border-radius:20px;padding:5px 22px;color:#a78bfa;font-size:0.8em;letter-spacing:0.1em;">
    2026 · 第五届"问途杯" · 决赛
  </div>
</div>

# 酒店智能客服应用
## 设计、整合与优化方案

<div style="margin:28px 0 10px 0;display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:24px;font-size:0.85em;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6)">
  <span>🏨 新会碧桂园凤凰酒店</span>
  <span style="opacity:0.4">·</span>
  <span>🤖 Dify × DeepSeek-V3</span>
</div>

<p><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="height:60px;opacity:0.92;vertical-align:middle;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(102,126,234,0.4))"></p>
<p style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);font-size:0.82em">符秀晶 · 温媛 · 李秋慧 · 符志鹏 | 指导教师：颜燕、李延平</p>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 2 — OPC 经营理念（先声夺人）
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---
<!-- _class: opc -->

# OPC 经营理念 · 极简商业单元

<div class="grid2" style="margin-top:20px">
<div class="card" style="border-color:rgba(248,113,113,0.3);background:rgba(248,113,113,0.06)">
<h3>❌ 传统客服模式</h3>

- 3–5 名客服，三班轮值
- 夜间响应缺口，凌晨询问流失
- 知识口径不一，差评风险高
- 人力成本 ¥18,000+/月
</div>
<div class="card card-blue">
<h3>✅ OPC × AI 模式</h3>

- 1 人运营 · 系统 7×24 自动响应
- 秒级答复 · 知识统一标准化
- 从"智能问答"→ "智能服务"
- 运营成本降低 > 95%
</div>
</div>

> 核心主张：用 AI 技术构建极简商业单元，让一人（甚至无需专职）即可运营专业级酒店智能前台，实现服务边界的根本性突破

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 3 — 目录
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---

# 路演目录

<div class="grid2" style="margin-top:16px">
<div>

<div class="hl-box" style="margin-bottom:12px">
<span class="tag">01</span> 需求分析与整体规划
</div>
<div class="hl-box" style="margin-bottom:12px">
<span class="tag">02</span> 知识库资料整理与构建
</div>
<div class="hl-box" style="margin-bottom:12px">
<span class="tag">03</span> 流程设计与功能模块规划
</div>
<div class="hl-box">
<span class="tag">04</span> 应用编排与关键节点配置
</div>

</div>
<div>

<div class="hl-box" style="margin-bottom:12px">
<span class="tag">05</span> 性能展示与成本优化
</div>
<div class="hl-box" style="margin-bottom:12px">
<span class="tag">06</span> 智能预订 Agent 整合
</div>
<div class="hl-box" style="margin-bottom:12px">
<span class="tag">07</span> 设计优化与迭代表现
</div>
<div class="hl-box">
<span class="tag" style="background:rgba(167,139,250,0.25);color:#c084fc">OPC</span> 总结与展望
</div>

</div>
</div>

     SLIDE 4 — CHAPTER 01
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---
<!-- _class: chapter -->

<div class="num">01</div>

# 需求分析
# 与整体规划设计

## 从问题出发，定义 AI 客服的真实价值

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 5 — 痛点数据
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---

# 客服痛点：五大真实场景

<div style="display:table;width:86%;border-collapse:separate;border-spacing:10px 0;margin:4px auto 0">
<div style="display:table-row">
<div style="display:table-cell;width:60%;vertical-align:middle">

| 痛点 | 量化影响 |
|:---|:---|
| ⏰ 响应延迟 | 高峰期等待 > 5 分钟 |
| 🌙 夜间缺口 | 23:00–8:00 无人接待 |
| 📚 知识分散 | 5类场景 · 5人口径不同 |
| 🔄 重复劳动 | 80% 问题为高频重复 |
| 💸 成本高企 | 3–5 名专职客服/月 |

</div>
<div style="display:table-cell;width:40%;vertical-align:middle;padding-left:4px">

<div class="card card-blue" style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:10px">
<span class="big">80%</span>
<span class="big-label">问题可被知识库标准化处理</span>
</div>

<div class="card" style="text-align:center">
<span style="font-size:2.2em;font-weight:900;color:#4ade80;display:block">¥18,000+</span>
<span class="big-label">传统模式月均人力成本</span>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 6 — 整体架构
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---

# 整体解决方案架构

<div class="flow-row" style="margin-top:12px">
  <div class="fn">客户发起咨询</div>
  <div class="fa">→</div>
  <div class="fn" style="border-color:rgba(167,139,250,0.5);background:rgba(167,139,250,0.1)">Dify 平台</div>
  <div class="fa">→</div>
  <div class="fn card-blue" style="border-color:rgba(56,189,248,0.5);background:rgba(56,189,248,0.1)">Chatflow 工作流<br><small>唯一客服入口</small></div>
</div>

<div style="display:table;width:100%;border-collapse:separate;border-spacing:14px 0;margin:10px -14px 0">
<div style="display:table-row">
<div style="display:table-cell;width:50%;vertical-align:top">
<div class="card card-blue" style="padding:12px 16px">
<h3>💬 FAQ 问答分支</h3>

- 问题分类器 → KB 强制检索 → LLM 精准回答
- 覆盖客房·餐饮·会议·周边 5 大场景
- 准确率 100%，响应 &lt; 3s
</div>
</div>
<div style="display:table-cell;width:50%;vertical-align:top">
<div class="card" style="padding:12px 16px;border-color:rgba(74,222,128,0.4);background:rgba(74,222,128,0.07)">
<h3>🏨 智能预订分支</h3>

- 意图识别 → MCP 工具链 → 全流程引导下单
- 实时查询房态、提交订单、推送支付二维码
- 与问答同一入口，无缝切换
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div style="display:table;width:100%;border-collapse:separate;border-spacing:10px 0;margin:10px -10px 0">
<div style="display:table-row">
  <div style="display:table-cell;width:33%;text-align:center;background:rgba(102,126,234,0.10);border:1px solid rgba(102,126,234,0.3);border-radius:8px;padding:7px 8px;font-size:0.82em">5 大知识场景<br><small style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5)">客房·餐饮·会议·周边·预订</small></div>
  <div style="display:table-cell;width:33%;text-align:center;background:rgba(102,126,234,0.10);border:1px solid rgba(102,126,234,0.3);border-radius:8px;padding:7px 8px;font-size:0.82em">DeepSeek-V3<br><small style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5)">通义插件 · temperature 0.1</small></div>
  <div style="display:table-cell;width:33%;text-align:center;background:rgba(102,126,234,0.10);border:1px solid rgba(102,126,234,0.3);border-radius:8px;padding:7px 8px;font-size:0.82em">5 个 MCP 工具<br><small style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5)">问途平台 V2.0 接入</small></div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 7 — CHAPTER 02
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---
<!-- _class: chapter -->

<div class="num">02</div>

# 知识库资料
# 整理与构建逻辑

## 结构化知识 · 是 AI 准确回答的地基

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 8 — 知识库分类
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---

# 五大知识域 · 全场景覆盖

<div style="max-width:93%;margin:0 auto 0 auto">

| 知识文档 | 核心内容 | 典型问题 |
|:---|:---|:---|
| 📋 酒店概况 | 地址·设施·服务·押金·宠物政策 | "停车收费吗？" "前台24小时吗？" |
| 🛏️ 客房产品 | 374间房·13种房型·楼层·加床 | "大床房几楼？" "可以带宠物入住？" |
| 🍽️ 餐饮娱乐 | 维也纳西餐厅·御品南豪中餐厅 | "早餐几点？" "包间怎么预约？" |
| 🏛️ 宴会会议 | 凤凰国际会议中心·花涧里会议室 | "容纳多少人？" "设备有投影仪吗？" |
| 🗺️ 周边景点 | 梁启超故居·小鸟天堂·圭峰山（基本介绍） | 深度咨询 → 引导致电前台 0750-662-9888 |

</div>

<div class="divider"></div>

<div class="grid3" style="margin-top:0">
  <div class="card" style="text-align:center;padding:10px">
    <span style="font-size:2em;font-weight:900;color:#38bdf8">900+</span><br>
    <small style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5)">结构化知识条目</small>
  </div>
  <div class="card" style="text-align:center;padding:10px">
    <span style="font-size:2em;font-weight:900;color:#a78bfa">UTF-8</span><br>
    <small style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5)">统一编码格式</small>
  </div>
  <div class="card" style="text-align:center;padding:10px">
    <span style="font-size:2em;font-weight:900;color:#4ade80">1 个</span><br>
    <small style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5)">统一知识库 ID</small>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 9 — 技术决策 · 中等详细
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---

# 两个关键技术决策

<div class="grid2" style="margin-top:16px">

<div>
<h3>🔧 决策一：编码统一化</h3>
<div class="card" style="margin:8px 0;border-color:rgba(248,113,113,0.3);background:rgba(248,113,113,0.05)">

⚠️ 根因：原始 GBK 格式文档上传 Dify 后，向量索引产生乱码
→ "可带宠物入住"无法被检索到
→ 模型回退训练数据，错误回答"不支持宠物入住"

</div>
<div class="card card-blue">

✅ 修复：全部转为 UTF-8 Markdown，"标准问答 + 事实条目"双段结构，Chunk 语义完整

</div>
</div>

<div>
<h3>🏗️ 决策二：统一知识库</h3>
<div class="card" style="margin:8px 0;border-color:rgba(248,113,113,0.3);background:rgba(248,113,113,0.05)">

❌ 旧方案：5 个独立知识库
→ 每次只检索 1 个 KB（Knowledge Base，知识库）
→ 跨场景问题（如"订房+宠物政策"）信息碎片化

</div>
<div class="card card-blue">

✅ 新方案：合并为 1 个统一 KB
+ `gte-rerank-v2` 跨文档重排序
→ top\_k=4，精准返回最相关块

</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 10 — CHAPTER 03
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---
<!-- _class: chapter -->

<div class="num">03</div>

# 流程设计
# 与功能模块规划

## 双模互补 · 稳健驱动 · 覆盖全场景

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 11 — 双模架构对比
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---

# Chatflow 集成架构：问答 + 预订合二为一

<div style="display:table;width:100%;border-collapse:separate;border-spacing:14px 0;margin:14px -14px 0">
<div style="display:table-row">
<div style="display:table-cell;width:50%;vertical-align:top">
<div class="card card-blue" style="padding:14px 16px">
<h3>💬 FAQ 问答路径</h3>

- 问题分类器 → **KB 强制检索** → LLM 精准输出
- 涵盖客房·餐饮·宴会·周边 5 大场景
- `memory window = 10` 多轮连贯
- 准确率 100%，响应 &lt; 3s，token 成本低
</div>
</div>
<div style="display:table-cell;width:50%;vertical-align:top">
<div class="card" style="padding:14px 16px;border-color:rgba(74,222,128,0.4);background:rgba(74,222,128,0.07)">
<h3>🏨 智能预订路径</h3>

- 预订意图识别 → MCP 工具链依次调用
- 查房态 → 收集姓名/电话/日期 → 提交订单
- 推送流水编号 + 支付二维码，全程无人工
- 与问答同一工作流，无缝跳转
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div style="display:table;width:100%;border-collapse:separate;border-spacing:10px 0;margin:10px -10px 0">
<div style="display:table-row">
  <div style="display:table-cell;width:25%;text-align:center;background:rgba(56,189,248,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(56,189,248,0.3);border-radius:8px;padding:8px;font-size:0.8em">KB 检索<br><small style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45)">分类器强制触发<br>准确率 100%</small></div>
  <div style="display:table-cell;width:25%;text-align:center;background:rgba(74,222,128,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(74,222,128,0.3);border-radius:8px;padding:8px;font-size:0.8em">预订能力<br><small style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45)">节点内嵌 MCP<br>全流程自动化</small></div>
  <div style="display:table-cell;width:25%;text-align:center;background:rgba(167,139,250,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(167,139,250,0.3);border-radius:8px;padding:8px;font-size:0.8em">稳定性<br><small style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45)">工作流可控<br>行为可预期</small></div>
  <div style="display:table-cell;width:25%;text-align:center;background:rgba(248,113,113,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(248,113,113,0.3);border-radius:8px;padding:8px;font-size:0.8em">OPC 价值<br><small style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45)">1人运营<br>7×24 全天候</small></div>
</div>
</div>

<blockquote style="margin-top:10px;font-size:0.88em">单一 Chatflow 工作流即可覆盖咨询与预订全场景，真正实现 OPC 极简运营</blockquote>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 12 — 预订 SOP 流程
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---

# Chatflow 预订节点 · 6 步工作流

<div class="flow-row" style="margin:24px 0 12px 0">
  <div class="fn" style="min-width:90px;text-align:center">① 理解意向<br><small>房型/日期/间数</small></div>
  <div class="fa">→</div>
  <div class="fn" style="min-width:90px;text-align:center">② 查询房态<br><small>MCP 实时查询</small></div>
  <div class="fa">→</div>
  <div class="fn" style="min-width:90px;text-align:center">③ 展示详情<br><small>房型图文介绍</small></div>
  <div class="fa">→</div>
  <div class="fn" style="min-width:100px;text-align:center">④ 收集信息<br><small>姓名/电话/日期</small></div>
  <div class="fa">→</div>
  <div class="fn" style="min-width:90px;text-align:center;border-color:rgba(74,222,128,0.5);background:rgba(74,222,128,0.08)">⑤ 提交订单<br><small>submitBooking</small></div>
  <div class="fa">→</div>
  <div class="fn" style="min-width:90px;text-align:center;border-color:rgba(56,189,248,0.5);background:rgba(56,189,248,0.08)">⑥ 支付引导<br><small>小途乐订小程序</small></div>
</div>

<div class="divider"></div>

关键约束：Step ④ 信息不完整时严禁跳到 Step ⑤，工具同一参数调用超过 2 次自动转人工 `0750-662-9888`
<div style="font-size:0.75em;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);margin-top:4px">Chatflow 工作流节点按顺序执行，每步均有校验，异常自动引导转人工</div>

<div class="grid3" style="margin-top:10px">
  <div class="card" style="padding:10px;text-align:center"><small>宾客姓名</small><br><strong>必填</strong></div>
  <div class="card" style="padding:10px;text-align:center"><small>手机号码</small><br><strong>必填</strong></div>
  <div class="card" style="padding:10px;text-align:center"><small>入/离日期</small><br><strong>YYYY-MM-DD</strong></div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 13 — CHAPTER 04
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---
<!-- _class: chapter -->

<div class="num">04</div>

# 应用编排
# 与关键节点配置

## 每个参数背后都是一次真实的踩坑

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 14 — 关键参数配置 · 中等详细
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---

# 关键参数 · 每一项都有原因

<div class="grid2" style="margin-top:10px">

<div>
<h3>模型 & 检索配置</h3>

| 参数 | 值 | 原因 |
|:---|:---:|:---|
| `temperature` | 0.1 | 极低随机性，答案稳定可复现 |
| `top_k` | 4 | 精准召回，不浪费 context |
| `reranker` | 启用 | 复杂政策问题准确率关键 |
| `max_iteration` | 5 | 防止 Agent 工具死循环 |
| `memory_window` | 10 | 保留足够上下文不过量消耗 |

</div>

<div>
<h3>System Prompt 四大原则</h3>

<div class="hl-box" style="margin-bottom:8px">
🈯 <strong>回复规范</strong>：中文直接开始，禁止技术标签泄露
</div>
<div class="hl-box" style="margin-bottom:8px">
📅 <strong>日期格式</strong>：工具传参强制 <code>YYYY-MM-DD</code>
</div>
<div class="hl-box" style="margin-bottom:8px">
🏨 <strong>房型代码表</strong>：13 种房型代码内嵌，工具调用零歧义
</div>
<div class="hl-box">
📚 <strong>知识库优先</strong>：引用政策时完整转述，禁止省略细节
</div>

</div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 15 — 止损机制
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---

# 异常止损机制 · 稳健性设计

<div class="grid2" style="margin-top:12px">

<div>

| 异常场景 | 处置策略 |
|:---|:---|
| 工具调用失败 | 最多重试 1 次，仍失败转人工 |
| 同参数重复调用 | ≤ 2 次限制，防 API 死循环 |
| 日期格式错误 | Prompt 层强制转换，不依赖模型 |
| 未知房型名称 | 礼貌告知 + 推荐最近似房型 |
| 提交订单报错 | 调用专用兜底工具引导处理 |
| 迭代上限到达 | 优雅退出 + 提供前台电话 |

</div>

<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;justify-content:center">
<div class="card card-blue" style="text-align:center">
<span style="font-size:2.4em;font-weight:900;color:#38bdf8;display:block">teamId = 234556</span>
<span style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);font-size:0.82em">首次调用必带，失败后无 teamId 重试一次，两次无果转人工</span>
</div>
<blockquote style="margin:0">稳健 > 聪明：宁可转人工，不在客人面前死循环</blockquote>
</div>

</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 16 — CHAPTER 05
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---
<!-- _class: chapter -->

<div class="num">05</div>

# 性能展示
# 与成本优化策略

## 数字见证 · 让数据替我们说话

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 17 — 准确率对比 ★ 中等详细
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---

# 优化前后准确率对比
<span style="font-size:0.7em;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);font-weight:400">📊 基于团队内部测试问卷（20 题 × 3 轮，共 60 次问答记录）</span>

<div style="display:table;width:100%;border-collapse:separate;border-spacing:0;margin-top:10px">
<div style="display:table-row">
<div style="display:table-cell;width:62%;vertical-align:top;padding-right:20px">

| 测试问题（真实用户询问） | 优化前 | 优化后 |
|:---|:---:|:---:|
| 可以带宠物入住吗？（含费用/体重/押金） | <span class="danger">❌ 错误</span> | <span class="success">✅ 完整正确</span> |
| 早餐几点开始？（维也纳 vs 中餐厅） | <span class="danger">⚠️ 不完整</span> | <span class="success">✅ 双餐厅准确</span> |
| 宠物押金退不退？ | <span class="danger">❌ 未提及</span> | <span class="success">✅ 无损坏全额退</span> |
| 有充电桩吗？ | <span class="danger">⚠️ 不确定</span> | <span class="success">✅ 准确：暂无</span> |
| 订两间大床房 5.21–5.22 | <span class="danger">❌ 不支持</span> | <span class="success">✅ 完整预订流程</span> |

</div>
<div style="display:table-cell;width:38%;vertical-align:middle">
<div style="text-align:center;padding:14px 10px;background:rgba(248,113,113,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(248,113,113,0.3);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:12px">
  <span style="font-size:2.4em;font-weight:900;color:#f87171">≈51%</span><br>
  <small style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5)">优化前 · 知识库检索准确率</small>
</div>
<div style="text-align:center;font-size:1.6em;color:#667eea;margin-bottom:12px">↓</div>
<div style="text-align:center;padding:14px 10px;background:rgba(102,126,234,0.12);border:1px solid rgba(102,126,234,0.35);border-radius:8px">
  <span style="font-size:2.4em;font-weight:900;color:#4ade80">100%</span><br>
  <small style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5)">优化后 · 知识库检索准确率</small>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 18 — 成本 ROI
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---

# 成本优化 · OPC 核心价值量化

<div style="display:table;width:100%;border-collapse:separate;border-spacing:18px 0;margin:16px -18px 0">
<div style="display:table-row">

<div style="display:table-cell;width:50%;vertical-align:top;padding-top:10px">
<div class="card" style="text-align:center;padding:22px 16px;border-color:rgba(248,113,113,0.4);background:rgba(248,113,113,0.06);margin-bottom:16px">
<span style="font-size:0.85em;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5)">传统客服 · 月均人力成本</span>
<span style="display:block;font-size:3.0em;font-weight:900;color:#f87171">¥18,000</span>
<span style="font-size:0.8em;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4)">3 人 × ¥6,000/月（含五险一金）</span>
</div>
<div class="card" style="text-align:center;padding:22px 16px;border-color:rgba(74,222,128,0.4);background:rgba(74,222,128,0.05)">
<span style="font-size:0.85em;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5)">AI 客服 · 月均运营成本</span>
<span style="display:block;font-size:3.0em;font-weight:900;color:#4ade80">< ¥500</span>
<span style="font-size:0.8em;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4)">API 调用 + 平台费 估算值</span>
</div>
</div>

<div style="display:table-cell;width:50%;vertical-align:top">
<div class="hl-box" style="text-align:center;padding:20px 16px;margin-bottom:14px">
<span style="font-size:2.4em;font-weight:900;color:#38bdf8">97%+</span><br>
<span style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6)">月均成本节省比例</span>
</div>
<div class="hl-box" style="text-align:center;padding:20px 16px;margin-bottom:14px">
<span style="font-size:2.4em;font-weight:900;color:#a78bfa">7 × 24</span><br>
<span style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6)">全天候服务，无夜班缺口</span>
</div>
<div class="hl-box" style="text-align:center;padding:20px 16px">
<span style="font-size:2.4em;font-weight:900;color:#4ade80">< 3s</span><br>
<span style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6)">平均响应时间</span>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 19 — CHAPTER 06
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---
<!-- _class: chapter -->

<div class="num">06</div>

# 智能预订 Agent
# 搭建与功能整合

## 从"能问"到"能订"——服务的质变

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 20 — MCP 工具链
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---

# MCP 工具链 · 完整预订闭环

<div class="flow-row" style="margin:20px 0 8px 0">
  <div class="fn" style="min-width:140px;text-align:center">
    <code>getAvailableRoomsByDate</code><br>
    <small>按日期查全部可用房型</small>
  </div>
  <div class="fa">→</div>
  <div class="fn" style="min-width:160px;text-align:center">
    <code>getAvailableRoomsByRoomTypeAndDate</code><br>
    <small>指定房型查可用性</small>
  </div>
  <div class="fa">→</div>
  <div class="fn" style="min-width:140px;text-align:center">
    <code>getRoomDetailByRoomCode</code><br>
    <small>获取完整房型描述</small>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="flow-row">
  <div class="fn" style="min-width:130px;text-align:center;border-color:rgba(74,222,128,0.5);background:rgba(74,222,128,0.07)">
    <code>submitBooking</code><br>
    <small>提交预订订单</small>
  </div>
  <div class="fa">+</div>
  <div class="fn" style="min-width:200px;text-align:center;border-color:rgba(248,196,113,0.5);background:rgba(248,196,113,0.07)">
    <code>getHotelHelpAfterSubmitBookingError</code><br>
    <small>提交失败兜底处理</small>
  </div>
  <div class="fa">→</div>
  <div class="fn" style="min-width:110px;text-align:center;border-color:rgba(56,189,248,0.5);background:rgba(56,189,248,0.08)">
    小途乐订<br>
    <small>小程序支付</small>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="divider"></div>

<div class="grid3" style="margin-top:0">
  <div class="card" style="padding:10px;text-align:center"><strong>13</strong> 种房型代码<br><small>内嵌 System Prompt</small></div>
  <div class="card" style="padding:10px;text-align:center"><strong>teamId 234556</strong><br><small>鉴权优先策略</small></div>
  <div class="card" style="padding:10px;text-align:center"><strong>WCP-[ID]</strong><br><small>订单流水号格式</small></div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 21 — 预订体验
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---

# 预订体验 · 完整对话示例

<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:10px;align-items:flex-start">

<div style="flex:1;text-align:center">
  <div style="font-size:0.62em;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);margin-bottom:5px;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase">Step 1 · 查询与选房</div>
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%;height:auto;max-height:390px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);display:block">
</div>

<div style="flex:1;text-align:center">
  <div style="font-size:0.62em;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);margin-bottom:5px;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase">Step 2 · 确认信息</div>
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%;height:auto;max-height:390px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);display:block">
</div>

<div style="flex:1;text-align:center">
  <div style="font-size:0.62em;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);margin-bottom:5px;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase">Step 3 · 下单支付</div>
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%;height:auto;max-height:390px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);display:block">
</div>

</div>
<div style="text-align:center;margin-top:10px;font-size:0.8em;color:#a0b8d8;letter-spacing:0.05em">从咨询到下单 · 全程无需人工介入 · 完成预订 &lt; 5 min</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 22 — CHAPTER 07
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---
<!-- _class: chapter -->

<div class="num">07</div>

# 设计优化
# 与性能迭代表现

## 持续迭代 · 每个版本解决一个真实问题

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 23 — 版本里程碑
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---

# 版本迭代里程碑

<div style="margin-top:16px">

<div class="card" style="margin-bottom:10px;padding:12px 20px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px">
  <span class="tag">v1.0</span>
  <span>初赛起点 · 多场景意图分类 · 基础问答框架搭建</span>
  <span style="margin-left:auto;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);font-size:0.8em">May 8</span>
</div>

<div class="card" style="margin-bottom:10px;padding:12px 20px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px">
  <span class="tag">v1.7</span>
  <span>景区购票分支上线 · 小程序支付二维码打通</span>
  <span style="margin-left:auto;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);font-size:0.8em">May 9</span>
</div>

<div class="card" style="margin-bottom:10px;padding:12px 20px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px">
  <span class="tag">v1.12</span>
  <span>酒店知识库整合 · 取消退款流程 · MCP 官方接入策略确立</span>
  <span style="margin-left:auto;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);font-size:0.8em">May 11</span>
</div>

<div class="card" style="margin-bottom:10px;padding:12px 20px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px">
  <span class="tag">v2.7</span>
  <span>意图三路路由架构 · 天气查询接入 · 导入稳定性修复</span>
  <span style="margin-left:auto;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);font-size:0.8em">May 14</span>
</div>

<div class="card card-blue" style="margin-bottom:10px;padding:12px 20px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px">
  <span class="tag">v3.2 ★</span>
  <span>预订分支接入组委会 MCP · getAvailableRoomsByDate 实时房态查询</span>
  <span style="margin-left:auto;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);font-size:0.8em">May 15</span>
</div>

<div class="card card-blue" style="padding:12px 20px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px">
  <span class="tag">v3.4 ★</span>
  <span>统一知识库 · 预订前置校验强化 · 开场语与建议问题最终收敛</span>
  <span style="margin-left:auto;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);font-size:0.8em">May 17</span>
</div>

</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 24 — 三层优化
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---

# 三层系统性优化

<div class="grid3" style="margin-top:20px">

<div class="card card-blue">
<h3>🏗️ 架构层</h3>

- 5 个独立 KB → 1 个统一 KB
- GBK → UTF-8 Markdown
- 碎片检索 → 跨文档重排序

<div style="text-align:center;margin-top:12px">
<span class="tag tag-green">消除根因</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="card card-purple">
<h3>🤖 模型层</h3>

- 启用 gte-rerank-v2
- temperature 0.3 → 0.1
- top_k 精准控制 = 4

<div style="text-align:center;margin-top:12px">
<span class="tag">提升稳定性</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="card" style="border-color:rgba(56,189,248,0.35);background:rgba(56,189,248,0.06)">
<h3>📝 提示词层</h3>

- 知识库强制使用规则
- 完整止损 + 死循环防护
- 房型代码表嵌入 Prompt

<div style="text-align:center;margin-top:12px">
<span class="tag" style="background:rgba(56,189,248,0.2);color:#38bdf8">精准约束</span>
</div>
</div>

</div>

<div class="divider"></div>

> 内部测试结果：知识库检索准确率 ≈ 51% → 100%　|　知识库覆盖内容正确率 10% → 100%　<span style="opacity:0.5;font-size:0.85em">（20题×3轮测试集）</span>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 25 — OPC 总结
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---
<!-- _class: opc -->

# OPC × AI · 极简商业单元的实践证明

<div class="grid2" style="margin-top:18px">

<div>

| AI 能力 | OPC 实现 |
|:---|:---|
| 7×24 自动响应 | 无夜班缺口，系统永不下线 |
| 统一知识库 | 1 人维护，全系统一致输出 |
| 在线预订闭环 | 客人自助完成订房无需人工 |
| 多轮对话记忆 | AI 代替人脑记住上下文 |
| 按量付费 API | 无固定人力，成本随业务弹性伸缩 |

</div>

<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;gap:14px">

<div class="hl-box" style="text-align:center">
<span style="font-size:1.0em;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5)">月均节省</span>
<span style="display:block;font-size:2.8em;font-weight:900;color:#4ade80">¥17,500+</span>
</div>

<div class="hl-box" style="text-align:center">
<span style="font-size:1.0em;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5)">年化 ROI</span>
<span style="display:block;font-size:2.8em;font-weight:900;color:#38bdf8">36× +</span>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<blockquote style="margin-top:12px;font-size:0.9em;text-align:left">实践证明：极简团队同样可以运营专业级 AI 客服——这正是 OPC 理念在酒店行业的完整落地</blockquote>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SLIDE 26 — 鸣谢
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
---

# 鸣谢

<div class="grid2" style="margin-top:20px;gap:20px">

<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px">

<div class="card card-blue" style="padding:16px 20px">
  <div style="font-size:1.1em;font-weight:700;color:#7dd3fc;margin-bottom:8px">🎓 学校领导与指导老师</div>
  <div style="font-size:0.88em;color:#c8d5e8;line-height:1.7">
    感谢海南职业技术学院颜燕院长的关心与支持<br>
    感谢指导老师颜燕、李延平的悉心指导<br>
    在方案设计与技术实现过程中给予了宝贵建议
  </div>
</div>

<div class="card" style="padding:16px 20px;border-color:rgba(74,222,128,0.3);background:rgba(74,222,128,0.05)">
  <div style="font-size:1.1em;font-weight:700;color:#4ade80;margin-bottom:8px">🏨 新会碧桂园凤凰酒店</div>
  <div style="font-size:0.88em;color:#c8d5e8;line-height:1.7">
    感谢酒店方对项目的支持与配合<br>
    提供了真实的业务场景与知识资料<br>
    是本项目落地实践的重要基础
  </div>
</div>

</div>

<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px">

<div class="card" style="padding:16px 20px;border-color:rgba(167,139,250,0.3);background:rgba(167,139,250,0.05)">
  <div style="font-size:1.1em;font-weight:700;color:#a78bfa;margin-bottom:8px">🛠️ 问途竞赛平台技术支持</div>
  <div style="font-size:0.88em;color:#c8d5e8;line-height:1.7">
    感谢竞赛平台技术团队的专业解答<br>
    在 MCP 工具接入与平台调试过程中<br>
    提供了及时有效的技术支持
  </div>
</div>

<div class="hl-box" style="padding:16px 20px;text-align:center">
  <div style="font-size:0.88em;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);margin-bottom:10px">团队成员</div>
  <div style="font-size:1.05em;font-weight:600;color:#e2e8f0">
    符秀晶 · 温媛 · 李秋慧 · 符志鹏
  </div>
  <div style="font-size:0.8em;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);margin-top:8px">
    海南职业技术学院 · 2026.05
  </div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
